---
title: "Ink Annotation Demo"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
revealjs-plugins:
  - ink
---

## How to annotate

- Tap the floating **orb** (or press **D**): a radial menu blooms open
- Inner ring: tools · middle ring: colors · outer ring: stroke sizes
- Pick the shapes tool and a fourth ring of shapes appears
- Drag the orb anywhere; the bloom always opens toward the screen
- Two-finger tap undoes on touch screens; **Z**/**Y** undo/redo
- Drawings stick to the slide and are restored on reload

## A slide to draw on

Some content worth annotating:

1. First important point
2. Second important point
3. Third important point

## Charts love ink

```{=html}
<div style="width:60%;height:260px;margin:auto;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#eef 0%,#dde 100%);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:12px;padding:16px;">
<div style="flex:1;height:40%;background:#1e88e5;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;"></div>
<div style="flex:1;height:70%;background:#43a047;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;"></div>
<div style="flex:1;height:55%;background:#fdd835;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;"></div>
<div style="flex:1;height:90%;background:#e53935;border-radius:4px 4px 0 0;"></div>
</div>
```

Circle the tallest bar!
